description: 15 semantic clusters defining the emotional arc for mood ordering. Clusters are traversed sequentially; within each cluster, nearest-neighbor (NN-TSP) determines local order. Adjacent clusters are oriented so the tail of one is nearest the head of the next.

algorithm.intra_cluster: Exhaustive NN-TSP (try every start node, pick shortest Hamiltonian path)
algorithm.orientation: Reverse cluster if tail-to-prev-tail distance < head-to-prev-tail distance
algorithm.distance_metric: Euclidean in 6D (V, A, D, K, L, I)

clusters.label: Calm / Peaceful
clusters.theme: Low arousal, positive valence, minimal darkness

clusters.label: Introspective
clusters.theme: Bridge into darker territory — high inwardness, muted arousal

clusters.label: Sad / Lonely
clusters.theme: Negative valence, low dominance, moderate longing

clusters.label: Dark / Brooding
clusters.theme: High darkness, low valence, moderate inwardness

clusters.label: Mysterious / Surreal
clusters.theme: Moderate darkness, low arousal, ethereal quality

clusters.label: Aggressive / Rebellious
clusters.theme: Very high arousal, high dominance, negative-to-mixed valence

clusters.label: Energetic / Groovy
clusters.theme: High arousal, positive valence, moderate dominance

clusters.label: Heroic / Epic
clusters.theme: High dominance, high arousal, positive valence

clusters.label: Determined / Focused
clusters.theme: High dominance, moderate arousal, functional orientation

clusters.label: Joyful / Upbeat
clusters.theme: High valence, high arousal, minimal darkness

emotional_arc: Peaceful → Warm → Nostalgic → Reflective → Introspective → Tense → Sad → Depressive → Dark → Mysterious → Aggressive → Energetic → Epic → Determined → Joyful
